architecture.summary: startDynamicHeartbeat SSE helper coexists with withHeartbeat. Only compare endpoint migrated. Imperative update/stop API. onProgress callback in comparator.ts.

integrations.summary: N/A - no new external integrations. Internal SSE stream only.

ui-ux.summary: 3 new phases: generating_skill, generating_baseline, scoring. Added to ProgressLog spinner/accent sets. ProgressLog added to ComparisonPage. Per-case phase reset.

performance.summary: 3 discrete callback points only. No sub-phase granularity. No over-engineering.

security.summary: N/A - no auth/permission changes. SSE stream is already localhost-only CORS.

edge-cases.summary: stop() called in try/catch success+error paths. Response writes become no-ops on dead stream. Per-case heartbeat reset with eval_id context.
